content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line bending rightward, and the car appears well-positioned near the center.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 54, target index = (54+5) % 121 = 59
- Target WP59: x=4.0667, y=3.4025
- Car: x=4.6601, y=2.9020, heading=151.12°
- dy = 3.4025 - 2.9020 = 0.5005, dx = 4.0667 - 4.6601 = -0.5934
- bearing = atan2(0.5005, -0.5934) → second quadrant: atan(0.5005/0.5934) = 40.1°, bearing = 180° - 40.1° = **139.9°**
- delta = 139.9 - 151.12 = **-11.22°** → right

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3796m, distance_from_center = 0.0457m
- is_left_of_center = false, edge_distance = 0.3796 - 0.0457 = 0.334m → clear
- No boundary override

Delta ~-11.2° → |delta| 5-15°, use steering_angle=-10, speed=1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta=-11.2° to WP59; applying -10° steering at 1.5 speed, car is slightly right of center with 0.33m edge clearance.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP52-65 region: track bends south, delta near -11° to -16° — use -10° to -15° steering at 1.5.",
    "Car consistently near center (~0.02-0.11m) — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use minimal or zero steering on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Southward bend WP52-70 requires sustained right steering; delta decreasing from -16° to -11° as car turns.",
    "Delta decreasing each step confirms car is tracking the curve correctly — reduce steering as delta reduces."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.9055, 4.8191, 4.7340, 4.6601],
    "y": [2.7291, 2.7795, 2.8395, 2.9020],
    "heading": [168.764, 162.322, 156.260, 151.118]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP59 at (4.067, 3.403): bearing=139.9°, delta=-11.2° → moderate right correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -10.0
}
```
